theme_notes: US airstrikes on Iranian radar/drone sites (and Iran's counter-strike on a US base in Kuwait); PSG winning back-to-back Champions Leagues on penalties over Arsenal in Budapest; Trump's $1.8B anti-weaponization slush fund frozen by a federal judge; daraxonrasib doubling pancreatic cancer survival at ASCO 2026.
settled: Cleaner than the US-Iran situation. Which, yes, is a compliment.
PSG won two Champions Leagues on penalties. Your slate resolved cleaner. Barely.
A judge froze $1.8B. A ceasefire held. Your balance finally got the memo.
youOwe: Iran shot down a US military drone over less principle. Think about that.

Even the anti-weaponization slush fund started bigger. This is just sad.

theyOwe: They owe you less than Arsenal's dignity is currently worth. That's saying something.
